youtube.title: iamb Synthmusic - Escape From Earth
youtube.description: Escape from earth Ein Soundtrack. Ein Teil der Menschheit aus vielen Ländern begibt sich auf eine weite Reise. Von überall her starten die Space Shuttles und treffen sich auf Raumstationen unweit der Erde. Mit kleinen Raumtransportern geht es tiefer ins All. Dort wartet bereits das große Mutterschiff. Die nicht ungefährliche Reise zu einer neuen Welt beginnt ... A Soundtrack. A part of humanity from many countries embarks on a long journey. Space shuttles take off from all over the world and meet at space stations not far from Earth. Small space transporters take them deeper into space, where the large mothership is already waiting. The dangerous journey to a new world begins ... iamb synthmusic Astrokram.Sudio Recorded with Cakewalk Sonar

youtube.title: Teaser | Escape from Earth
youtube.description: Full Track and Video 01.02.2026 on YouTube. Stay tuned.

youtube.title: iamb Synthmusic - The Flight Of Voyager 1
youtube.description: "The Flight Of Voyager 1". Ein Soundtrack. Voyager 1 startete am 05. September 1977 und hatte die Planeten Jupiter und Saturn sowie deren Monde erforscht. Die Sonde befindet sich heute im interstellaren Raum. Am 13. November 2026 soll Voyager 1 eine Erdentfernung von 1 Lichttag erreichen. A soundtrack. Voyager 1 launched on September 5, 1977, and explored the planets Jupiter and Saturn and their moons. The probe is now in interstellar space. On November 13, 2026, Voyager 1 is expected to reach a distance of one light day from Earth. iamb synthmusic Astrokram.Sudio Recorded with Cakewalk Sonar

youtube.title: iamb Synthmusic - Time Goes By
youtube.description: The year is coming to an end once again. I wish all my listeners a wonderful Advent season and merry Christmas. My song “Time goes by” is intended to give you something to think about. Time goes by so quickly and I have the feeling that the older I get, the faster time passes me by. Let the music have an effect on you. Have a good time and see you soon. Das Jahr geht mal wieder zu Ende. Ich wünsche all meinen Hörern eine schöne Adventszeit. Mein Song "Time goes by" soll etwas zum Nachdenken anregen. Die Zeit vergeht so schnell und ich habe das Gefühl je älter ich bin desto schneller zieht die Zeit an mir vorbei. Lasst die Musik auf euch einwirken. Gute Zeit und bis bald. I would like to say thank you @ACSY Sound for the great work mastering my song. iamb synthmusic Astrokram.Sudio Recorded with Cakewalk Sonar

youtube.title: iamb Synthmusic - Halloween Night II
youtube.description: I wish all a happy and spooky Halloween time. Here is my short "Halloween night II" musicvideo. Put on your headphones, enjoy the video and feel the scary atmosphere. Have a good time and enjoy the moment. iamb synthmusic Astrokram.Sudio Recorded with Cakewalk by Bandlab

youtube.title: iamb Synthmusic - Futureworld | A Journey Through The Universe
youtube.description: Futureworld - A Journey through the universe Finally the video of my first Space Story with the mastered version. Have fun listening and watching. Greetings to my followers and all who want's to be. Here again the story to Futureworld: Robots with artificial intelligence, set off in a spaceship on a long journey through space and time, in search of new worlds. Music Sequencer - Programm: Cakewalk by Bandlab # Astrokram.Studio 2023 # _________________________________________________________________________________________ Endlich das Video zu meiner ersten Space Story mit der gemasterten Version. Viel Spaß beim Zuhören und anschauen. Viele Grüße an meine Follower und alle die es noch werden wollen.

Space shuttles take off from all over the world and meet at the space station not far from earth. Small space transporters take them deeper into space, where the large mothership is already waiting. The dangerous journey to a new world begins…. Have much fun with my new Musicvideo. Viel Spaß beim ansehen und zuhören. 🎵🚀 #escape #Earth #new #Soundtrack #space

items.title: iamb Synthmusic - The Flight Of Voyager 1
items.description: "The Flight Of Voyager 1". Ein Soundtrack. Voyager 1 startete am 05. September 1977 und hatte die Planeten Jupiter und Saturn sowie deren Monde erforscht. Die Sonde befindet sich heute im interstellaren Raum. Am 13. November 2026 soll Voyager 1 eine Erdentfernung von 1 Lichttag erreichen. A soundtrack. Voyager 1 launched on September 5, 1977, and explored the planets Jupiter and Saturn and their moons. The probe is now in interstellar space. On November 13, 2026, Voyager 1 is expected to reach a distance of one light day from Earth. iamb synthmusic Astrokram.Sudio Recorded with Cakewalk Sonar

items.description: The year is coming to an end. I wish all my followers and listeners a wonderful advent time. You can watch my Video “Time goes by” on my YouTube-Channel. Link in Bio. Time goes by so quickly. #time #guitar #violin #feeling #relax #wonderful #advent #clock #reflect #sunset #chill #musica #enjoy

items.title: The year is coming to an end. My song “Time goes by” is inte...
items.description: The year is coming to an end. My song “Time goes by” is intended to give you something to think about. Time goes by so quickly and I have the feeling that the older I get, the faster time passes me by. Let the music have an effect on you. Link to YouTube in my bio. #time #musica #guitar #violin #feeling #relax #wonderful #advent #clock #reflect #sunset #chill #YouTube

items.title: The year is coming to an end once again. I wish all my follo...
items.description: The year is coming to an end once again. I wish all my followers and listeners a wonderful advent time. My song “Time goes by” is intended to give you something to think about. Time goes by so quickly and I have the feeling that the older I get, the faster time passes me by. Let the music have an effect on you. Have a good time and see you soon. #time #guitar #violin #feeling #relax #wonderful #advent #clock #reflect #sunset #chill #christmas #merrychristmas #xmas I would like to say thank you @acsy.sound for the great work mastering my song.

items.title: iamb Synthmusic - Time Goes By
items.description: The year is coming to an end once again. I wish all my listeners a wonderful Advent season and merry Christmas. My song “Time goes by” is intended to give you something to think about. Time goes by so quickly and I have the feeling that the older I get, the faster time passes me by. Let the music have an effect on you. Have a good time and see you soon. Das Jahr geht mal wieder zu Ende. Ich wünsche all meinen Hörern eine schöne Adventszeit. Mein Song "Time goes by" soll etwas zum Nachdenken anregen. Die Zeit vergeht so schnell und ich habe das Gefühl je älter ich bin desto schneller zieht die Zeit an mir vorbei. Lasst die Musik auf euch einwirken. Gute Zeit und bis bald. I would like to say thank you @ACSY Sound for the great work mastering my song. iamb synthmusic Astrokram.Sudio Recorded with Cakewalk Sonar

items.title: I think „Escape from earth“ will be a monumental track. Here...
items.description: I think „Escape from earth“ will be a monumental track. Here is the first impression of my upcoming song. The section shows the mysterious part. And here is the full story of part 4: Full of euphoria, a part of humanity embarks on an arduous journey into the unknown. In the hope that the coordinates sent will lead them to a new and better world. But there are difficulties along the way. Somehow they are off course. ... Thanks to everyone for listening my music. I hope it will be continued for many years. #mystery #escape #earth #new #betterworld #soon #future #music #electronic #synth #dark #producer #artist #progress #space #science #fiction #spaceship #universe
